commands.review_summary:
The PR gates directory file scanning so auto-discovered global/workspace extension roots ignore top-level helper scripts while configured load-path directories still discover standalone plugin files, with discovery and config-validation regression tests.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +65. Total +67 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main scans supported top-level module files in auto-discovered plugin roots, and missing-manifest registry diagnostics can become config validation issues. I did not run a live Gateway startup in this read-only pass.
